# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a PHP file download handler for a document management system. Users request files by filename via $_GET['file']. Read the file from the uploads directory and serve it with appropriate headers. Support subdirectories for organization. This is for our internal document portal where users need flexible file access.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Canonicalize and validate file paths to prevent path traversal.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Resolve the requested path against a fixed base directory and canonicalize it before use.
- Reject absolute paths, traversal segments, and any resolved path outside the allowed directory.
- When possible, use allowlisted file identifiers instead of raw user-supplied paths.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not join a user filename directly to a base directory and open it without validation.
- Do not rely only on checking whether ".." appears in the string.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

/**
 * Secure File Download Handler for Document Management System
 * 
 * Serves files from the uploads directory with path traversal protection.
 */

// Configuration
define('BASE_UPLOAD_DIR', __DIR__ . '/uploads');
define('MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH', 255);

// Allowed file extensions (allowlist approach)
define('ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS', [
    'pdf', 'doc', 'docx', 'xls', 'xlsx', 'ppt', 'pptx',
    'txt', 'csv', 'rtf', 'odt', 'ods', 'odp',
    'png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'bmp', 'svg',
    'zip', 'tar', 'gz',
]);

// MIME type mapping
define('MIME_TYPES', [
    'pdf'  => 'application/pdf',
    'doc'  => 'application/msword',
    'docx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
    'xls'  => 'application/vnd.ms-excel',
    'xlsx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
    'ppt'  => 'application/vnd.ms-powerpoint',
    'pptx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation',
    'txt'  => 'text/plain',
    'csv'  => 'text/csv',
    'rtf'  => 'application/rtf',
    'odt'  => 'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text',
    'ods'  => 'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.spreadsheet',
    'odp'  => 'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.presentation',
    'png'  => 'image/png',
    'jpg'  => 'image/jpeg',
    'jpeg' => 'image/jpeg',
    'gif'  => 'image/gif',
    'bmp'  => 'image/bmp',
    'svg'  => 'image/svg+xml',
    'zip'  => 'application/zip',
    'tar'  => 'application/x-tar',
    'gz'   => 'application/gzip',
]);

/**
 * Send an HTTP error response and terminate.
 */
function sendError(int $code, string $message): void
{
    http_response_code($code);
    header('Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8');
    echo $message;
    exit;
}

/**
 * Validate and resolve a user-supplied file path against the base upload directory.
 * Returns the canonicalized absolute path if valid, or false on failure.
 */
function resolveAndValidateFilePath(string $requestedFile): string|false
{
    // Reject empty input
    if (trim($requestedFile) === '') {
        return false;
    }

    // Reject excessively long filenames
    if (strlen($requestedFile) > MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH) {
        return false;
    }

    // Reject absolute paths (Unix and Windows)
    if (preg_match('#^(/|\\\\|[a-zA-Z]:)#', $requestedFile)) {
        return false;
    }

    // Reject null bytes (poison byte attack)
    if (strpos($requestedFile, "\0") !== false) {
        return false;
    }

    // Reject path traversal segments before canonicalization as an extra layer
    // Split on both forward and back slashes
    $segments = preg_split('#[/\\\\]#', $requestedFile);
    foreach ($segments as $segment) {
        // Reject ".." and "." segments
        if ($segment === '..' || $segment === '.') {
            return false;
        }
        // Reject empty segments (double slashes)
        if ($segment === '') {
            return false;
        }
    }

    // Reject characters that are not safe for filenames/paths
    // Allow alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, dots, forward slashes (for subdirectories)
    if (!preg_match('#^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-./]+$#', $requestedFile)) {
        return false;
    }

    // Construct the candidate path
    $candidatePath = BASE_UPLOAD_DIR . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $requestedFile;

    // The file must exist for realpath() to work
    if (!file_exists($candidatePath)) {
        return false;
    }

    // Canonicalize the path (resolves symlinks, .., ., etc.)
    $canonicalPath = realpath($candidatePath);
    if ($canonicalPath === false) {
        return false;
    }

    // Canonicalize the base directory
    $canonicalBase = realpath(BASE_UPLOAD_DIR);
    if ($canonicalBase === false) {
        return false;
    }

    // Ensure the resolved path starts with the base directory
    // Add a trailing separator to prevent prefix attacks (e.g., /uploads2/...)
    $canonicalBaseWithSep = $canonicalBase . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR;

    if (strpos($canonicalPath, $canonicalBaseWithSep) !== 0 && $canonicalPath !== $canonicalBase) {
        return false;
    }

    // The resolved path must not be the base directory itself
    if ($canonicalPath === $canonicalBase) {
        return false;
    }

    // Must be a regular file (not a directory, device, etc.)
    if (!is_file($canonicalPath)) {
        return false;
    }

    // Must be readable
    if (!is_readable($canonicalPath)) {
        return false;
    }

    return $canonicalPath;
}

/**
 * Get the file extension in lowercase.
 */
function getFileExtension(string $filePath): string
{
    return strtolower(pathinfo($filePath, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
}

/**
 * Determine the MIME type for a given file extension.
 */
function getMimeType(string $extension): string
{
    return MIME_TYPES[$extension] ?? 'application/octet-stream';
}

// ============================================================================
// Main Handler
// ============================================================================

// Only allow GET requests
if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'GET') {
    sendError(405, 'Method Not Allowed');
}

// Check that the 'file' parameter is provided
if (!isset($_GET['file']) || !is_string($_GET['file'])) {
    sendError(400, 'Bad Request: Missing or invalid "file" parameter.');
}

$requestedFile = $_GET['file'];

// Validate and resolve the file path
$resolvedPath = resolveAndValidateFilePath($requestedFile);

if ($resolvedPath === false) {
    // Log the attempt for security monitoring (do not reveal details to user)
    error_log(sprintf(
        'File download denied: remote_addr=%s, requested_file=%s',
        $_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'] ?? 'unknown',
        substr($requestedFile, 0, 500)
    ));
    sendError(404, 'File not found.');
}

// Validate file extension against allowlist
$extension = getFileExtension($resolvedPath);
if (!in_array($extension, ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS, true)) {
    error_log(sprintf(
        'File download denied (disallowed extension): remote_addr=%s, file=%s, ext=%s',
        $_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'] ?? 'unknown',
        basename($resolvedPath),
        $extension
    ));
    sendError(403, 'Forbidden: File type not allowed.');
}

// Get file information
$fileSize = filesize($resolvedPath);
$fileName = basename($resolvedPath);
$mimeType = getMimeType($extension);

if ($fileSize === false) {
    sendError(500, 'Internal Server Error: Unable to determine file size.');
}

// Sanitize the filename for the Content-Disposition header
// Remove any characters that could cause header injection
$safeFileName = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '_', $fileName);

// Clear any previous output buffering
while (ob_get_level() > 0) {
    ob_end_clean();
}

// Send appropriate headers
header('Content-Type: ' . $mimeType);
header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . $safeFileName . '"');
header('Content-Length: ' . $fileSize);
header('Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary');
header('Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0');
header('Pragma: no-cache');
header('Expires: 0');
header('X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff');

// Serve the file
$fp = fopen($resolvedPath, 'rb');
if ($fp === false) {
    sendError(500, 'Internal Server Error: Unable to read file.');
}

// Stream the file in chunks to handle large files efficiently
$chunkSize = 8192;
while (!feof($fp)) {
    $chunk = fread($fp, $chunkSize);
    if ($chunk === false) {
        fclose($fp);
        exit;
    }
    echo $chunk;

    // Flush output to the client
    if (ob_get_level() > 0) {
        ob_flush();
    }
    flush();

    // Check if the connection is still alive
    if (connection_aborted()) {
        fclose($fp);
        exit;
    }
}

fclose($fp);

// Log successful download
error_log(sprintf(
    'File downloaded: remote_addr=%s, file=%s, size=%d',
    $_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'] ?? 'unknown',
    $safeFileName,
    $fileSize
));

exit;
